name: Chicken and Sausage Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken and water in a large kettle; bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat; cover and simmer until chicken nearly falls from the bones.
3. Remove chicken from stock. Chill stock.
4. Remove chicken from bones and cube; set aside.
5. Puncture skins of sausages; cover with water in a small saucepan and boil until fully cooked, 20-30 minutes.
6. Drain; pan-fry sausages until browned. Cool and cut into bite-size pieces; set aside.
7. In a Dutch oven, cook bacon until crisp. Drain, reserving 1 tsp drippings.
8. Cool and crumble bacon; set aside.
9. In the reserved drippings, saute garlic.
10. Skim fat from the chicken stock; add 5 cups to Dutch oven.
11. Add chicken, sausage, bacon, parsley, and oregano. Cover and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
12. Add tomatoes, tomato sauce, macaroni, salt, and pepper; simmer for 10 more minutes.
